textByHash.7e1e7fc60071312108b2657b4f457f5f8edf7cb9: 'Ello there lad! What can I be getting you?
textByHash.6065ce78f81ad2b3f0e615461fe53927c68428d3: 'Ello there lassy! What can I be getting you?
textByHash.c4b3bb60a5fa253eef38a43c8fd32852bc1c5410: Of course, what would you like?
textByHash.64d733332dcee4f141f3f03421167a1f6d513f76: We're always running a keg of our locally-brewed ale, Lizardkicker.
textByHash.ca019bbb9dd4f4a26a873b7e3ae6c82fa4069e02: I will warn you though, its an acquired taste.
textByHash.d7c28a048997dc574bb5ba38a62907ea9b10c71b: Oh, the usual... Wheat, hops, yeast...
textByHash.4ecccafda48f8dd4d8ea3586dbaa417d81752519: This here is the Cloak and Stagger. The finest drinking establishment in the whole of Shayzien.
textByHash.fb7fe395c3230c06969017b3c17c93a343507067: Like I say, the finest in all of Shayzien!
textByHash.3b9c8e69f6fdf02d80bc479407a4e91b7adde6bc: Most of our patrons are soldiers returning on leave from the frontlines. We do get a few regular folk in too though.
textByHash.bb77a7d74287780ab361507fc2c5aaf944b97c3e: By the way, its generally considered polite to buy a drink if you're going to stand around and chat.
textByHash.82e0fea6a1766ce3567eeabf75f70989ca195e7d: ...With that said, is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.9673a99baba2d66b86861d53b87c7ea299106f6b: Apparently Veos is looking for some help with something. He hangs around the docks of Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.4c66973af106af665d4298b1d99016682511984b: They say there's trouble in Port Piscarilius. Something about gangs uniting. Might be worth looking into.
textByHash.e5d39fe29713421435844c92f62a3359018d5773: I hear that Lord Hosidius has misplaced one of his sons. The Hosidius family might pay a lot to see him returned safely.
textByHash.765bcd607c66a461d6900d403ed4744d8f4fddd3: Phileas Rimor has supposedly been looking for some assistance with something in Shayzien. Maybe worth investigating.
textByHash.cb48bd4809a7679236fb21affffb65faaa19d370: I hear that the rulers of Lovakengj have some work available. You'll find them in the Lovakengj Assembly.
textByHash.5e7cef9b94d8fe65eaecfc1725126c5cbbac1291: Apparently there's been some commotion in the middle of Arceuus. Might be worth checking out.
textByHash.57bc008e47142d0b069df08cbec0694455752ef1: That protest outside Kourend Castle is starting to attract some attention. Could be worth taking a look.
textByHash.a90965fbfb22e6cb87a3f99c02ab263203de5709: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.
